spray.harvest_safety_message: Crop is approaching harvest. Stop all chemical sprays to prevent residue on the final product. Monitor manually.
spray.high_wind_message: Do not spray today. Wind speed {wind_speed} km/h is too high. Wait for calm conditions (below 40 km/h).
spray.rain_block_message: Do not spray today. Rain expected ({rainfall} mm). Chemicals will wash off — skip spray today.
spray.organic_risk_message: Organic farm — no chemical spray. Use neem oil or approved biopesticide per local organic practice. Health {health}%, NDVI {ndvi}.
spray.organic_ok_message: Organic farm — no chemical spray needed today. Continue monitoring using neem oil or biopesticides as preventive practice.
spray.fungal_message: Apply {chemical} at {dose}. Timing: Morning (6–10 AM). Reason: Fungal risk — humidity {humidity}% (threshold {crit_humidity}%), temp {temp}°C, NDVI {ndvi} below threshold {ndvi_threshold}.
spray.pest_message: Apply {chemical} at {dose}. Timing: Evening (4–6 PM). Reason: Pest pressure — health at {health}%, NDVI dropped to {ndvi}.
spray.moderate_wind_message: Moderate wind — spray conditions not ideal. Monitor closely.
spray.no_spray_message: Disease pressure low. No chemical spray needed. Continue regular monitoring.
fertigation.ripening_message: Crop is in the ripening/harvest phase. Withholding fertilizer to ensure natural maturity and avoid late-stage residue.
fertigation.organic_needed_message: Apply organic compost or vermicompost. Reason: NDVI {ndvi} (target ≥ {ndvi_threshold}), health {health}%. Method: Broadcast or drip-compatible organic liquid. Timing: Morning (6–10 AM).
fertigation.organic_ok_message: No organic fertigation needed today. Nutrients balanced.
fertigation.inorganic_message:
Chemical: {nutrient} — {dose} kg/acre. Morning (6–10 AM), dissolve product, then fertigation or broadcast with irrigation.
Fertilizer: {nutrient}  |  Qty: {dose} kg/acre
Method: Dissolve in water, apply through drip system. Run drip 30–45 min after injection.
Timing: Morning (6–10 AM), dissolve product, then fertigation or broadcast with irrigation.
fertigation.none_message: Nutrient levels adequate. NDVI {ndvi} ≥ threshold {ndvi_threshold}. No fertigation required today.
irrigation.stress_message: Sensor indicates {stress_level} water stress. Immediate irrigation required to prevent permanent wilting.
irrigation.skip_rain_message: Skip irrigation. Rain expected ({rainfall} mm in next 5 days). Soil moisture at {soil_moisture}%.
irrigation.needed_message:
Give {method} irrigation for about {hours} hours today. (~{mm} mm)
Qty: {mm} mm  |  Method: {method}/Sprinkler ~{minutes} min  |  Time: Morning (6–10 AM)
irrigation.ok_message: Soil moisture adequate at {soil_moisture}% (ideal range {ideal_range}). No immediate irrigation needed. Next check in 2–3 days.
weather.update_message: Temp {temp}°C, humidity {humidity}%, wind {wind} km/h. Conditions normal. No weather alerts.
weather.heat_today: Max temp {temp}°C today. Monitor for heat stress.
weather.frost_today: Low temp {temp}°C. Watch for frost risk on sensitive crops.
weather.heavy_rain: Heavy rain ({rainfall} mm) expected. Delay spray until 2 days after rain.
weather.high_wind_today: High wind ({wind} km/h). Do not spray.
weather.high_humidity: Very high humidity ({humidity}%). Increased fungal disease risk.
weather.forecast_wind: High wind (>40 km/h) forecasted in {days} days. Delay sprays.
weather.forecast_heatwave: Heatwave risk (>38°C) expected in {days} days. Ensure deep irrigation beforehand.
weather.forecast_frost: Frost risk (<4°C) expected in {days} days. Protect sensitive crops.
crop_risk.high_organic_message:
Organic farm. High risk detected. Use approved biocontrol or neem-based products only — no synthetic sprays.
Watch for: {diseases}. Common pests: {pests}.
crop_risk.high_message: High disease/pest risk. Common diseases: {diseases}. Common pests: {pests}. Scout field and spray if threshold exceeded.
crop_risk.medium_message: Moderate risk. Watch for: {diseases}. Increase monitoring frequency. Prepare sprays if symptoms appear.
crop_risk.low_message: Disease pressure low. No chemical spray needed. Continue regular monitoring.
monitoring.title: Crop monitoring
monitoring.ndvi_drop_urgent: URGENT: NDVI has dropped sharply (trend {ndvi_trend}). Immediate field scouting required to identify cause (pest/disease/water stress).
monitoring.routine_check: Check lower leaves, stem base, and new growth for any stress or pest signs.
monitoring.low_health: Health is low ({health}%). Look for yellowing, wilting, or lesions.
monitoring.low_ndvi: NDVI very low ({ndvi}). Inspect canopy density and leaf color.
carbon.title: Carbon tracking update
carbon.message: Emissions: {emission} kg CO2, Captured: {captured} kg CO2, Net: {net} kg CO2. {balance}
carbon.positive_balance: Net CO2 balance positive: {amount} kg CO2 captured.
carbon.negative_balance: Net CO2 balance: {amount} kg CO2 emitted.
system.incomplete_forecast: Weather forecast data provided covers less than 5 days. Predictive alerts may be limited.
unknown.note: Crop '{crop}' is not in the knowledge base.
unknown.spray_message: Crop '{crop}' is not in the knowledge base. Monitor spray conditions manually.
unknown.fertigation_message: Crop '{crop}' is not in the knowledge base. No fertilizer recommendation available. Consult an agronomist.
unknown.irrigation_message: Crop '{crop}' is not in the knowledge base. Check soil moisture manually and irrigate if below 35%.
unknown.weather_message: Check local weather forecast for alerts.
unknown.crop_risk_message: Crop '{crop}' is not in the knowledge base. Monitor for pests and disease manually.
unknown.monitoring_message: Inspect crop visually. Report any stress signs.
unknown.carbon_message: No carbon tracking data available for this crop.
